summary: Iteration 73 - Tested Australian English audit, landing page tier comparison toggle, and backend cases router extraction. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend tier comparison table verified with 27 rows, 4 columns, correct pricing (FREE/7, $150/15, $200/20), 5 EXCLUSIVE sections, and word count row. Cases API fully functional after router extraction.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cases router successfully extracted to /app/backend/routers/cases.py and wired via app.include_router(cases_router). All 5 CRUD endpoints working. Tier comparison table on landing page has data-testid='tier-comparison-section' and data-testid='tier-comparison-table'. Barrister View URL format is /cases/:caseId/reports/:reportId/barrister (not /barrister-view/:caseId).

backend_cases_router.GET /api/cases: PASSED - Returns list with document_count and event_count
backend_cases_router.POST /api/cases: PASSED - Creates case with checklist initialization
backend_cases_router.DELETE /api/cases/{case_id}: PASSED - Deletes case and related data
backend_cases_router.auth_required_tests: PASSED - All endpoints return 401 without auth

frontend_tier_comparison.row_count: PASSED - 27 rows (26 sections + 1 word count row)
frontend_tier_comparison.column_count: PASSED - 4 columns (Section, Quick Summary, Full Detailed, Extensive Log)

australian_english_audit.dialogue_spelling: PASSED - 'dialogue' used in CaseDetail.jsx and AuthModal.jsx
australian_english_audit.no_american_spellings: PASSED - No user-facing American English found

other_pages.case_detail: PASSED - All 7 tabs visible (documents, timeline, grounds, notes, reports, legal, progress)
other_pages.barrister_view: PASSED - Loads with correct URL format /cases/:caseId/reports/:reportId/barrister
other_pages.how_it_works: PASSED - Shows pricing and section counts

cases_router_extraction.notes: Router extracted from server.py to /app/backend/routers/cases.py. Wired at line 4743-4744 in server.py

tier_comparison_table.notes: Side-by-side comparison showing all 26 sections across 3 tiers with EXCLUSIVE markers for Extensive Log

australian_english.notes: User-facing text uses Australian English (dialogue, analyse, organise). CSS/code properties like 'color', 'center', 'behavior' are acceptable
